topics.title: NoSQL & MongoDB Essentials
topics.label: Foundation
topics.description: Understand NoSQL concepts and MongoDB fundamentals: documents, collections, BSON, and when to choose document databases.
topics.goal: Explain MongoDB's document model and use it for simple data storage needs.

topics.title: Data Modeling in MongoDB
topics.label: Intermediate
topics.description: Learn embedding vs referencing, schema design patterns, modelling one-to-many relationships, and trade-offs for read/write patterns.
topics.goal: Design an efficient document model for a sample application.

topics.title: CRUD and Aggregation Framework
topics.label: Intermediate
topics.description: Perform CRUD operations, and use the aggregation framework for transforms, grouping, and analytics within the database.
topics.goal: Write aggregation pipelines to reshape and summarise data.

topics.title: Indexing and Query Performance
topics.label: Intermediate
topics.description: Understand indexes, index types, explain plans, and strategies to improve read performance while balancing write costs.
topics.goal: Add appropriate indexes and interpret explain output to optimise queries.

topics.title: Replication and High Availability
topics.label: Advanced
topics.description: Configure replica sets for redundancy, understand election behavior, read preferences, and how to operate a highly available cluster.
topics.goal: Design a replica set for fault tolerance and failover.

topics.title: Sharding and Scalability
topics.label: Advanced
topics.description: Learn sharding fundamentals, choosing shard keys, balancing, and considerations for large-scale MongoDB deployments.
topics.goal: Plan a sharded deployment for heavy-write workloads.

topics.title: Backups, Security and Operations
topics.label: Advanced
topics.description: Perform backups and restores, secure MongoDB (authentication, authorization, encryption), and monitor health and resource usage.
topics.goal: Implement backup and security best-practices for a MongoDB deployment.

subjectTracks.title: MongoDB Fundamentals
subjectTracks.description: Core MongoDB skills: modelling, queries, and basic performance tuning.

subjectTracks.title: MongoDB Operations
subjectTracks.description: Operate MongoDB at scale: replication, sharding, backups and security.
